{{Quote|I will not tell you that Lujayne or Carter or Pirgi or the others would want you to keep fighting, or that your fighting will make their sacrifice worth it.|Wedge Antilles, speaking at a memorial shortly after Pirgi's death|<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />}}
'''Pirgi''' was an individual who served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as a sentry at [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] [[Talasea base|base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talasea]]<ref name="Rogue Squadron" /> in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].<ref name="Date" /> Pirgi was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Raid on Talasea|raid]] on Talasea, which was designed to eliminate Rogue Squadron, an elite New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. Shortly after the raid, a memorial was held on the ''[[Reprieve]]'', an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]. At the memorial, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of Rogue Squadron, gave a speech in memory of those killed in the raid. Shortly after the speech, Pirgi's body, along with bodies of the other five sentries and Rogue Squadron [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Lujayne Forge]], were placed into caskets, and sent drifting towards [[Morobe]], Talasea's [[Star/Legends|sun]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pirgi was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />
